description: SkillType enum members have no explicit integer values assigned. All other enums in this set use explicit values. If a member is ever inserted or reordered, implicit values will shift, breaking saved data that serialized old integer values.
suggestedFix: Add explicit integer values: Keeper = 0, Defending = 1, Playmaking = 2, Winger = 3, Scoring = 4, Passing = 5, SetPieces = 6, Stamina = 7.

description: GetDisplayName throws KeyNotFoundException for invalid SkillLevel values. If a save file contains a value outside 1-20 (corrupted or future version), dictionary lookup crashes load with no fallback.
suggestedFix: Use TryGetValue with fallback: if (!DisplayNames.TryGetValue(level, out var name)) return $"unknown ({(int)level})"; return name;
